---
#title: Petrobras Python Package
title: "Scalable Unified Python Package for Subsea CV at Petrobras"
authors:
  - name: Rodrigo Souza dos Santos
    affiliation: AIR/Compass
    roles: writing
    corresponding: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

---

{{< include contents/explanation.qmd >}}

---

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    %% Components
    subgraph Sources
        A1([ Subsea Videos])
        A2([ Subsea Images])
        A3([ Subsea Reports])
    end

    B([ Ingestion API & Connectors])
    C([ Storage Layer])
    D([ Distributed Processing])
    E([ Feature Engineering])
    F([ Feature Store])
    G([ Experiment Management])
    H([ Governance])

    %% Relationships
    A1 --> B
    A2 --> B
    A3 --> B
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> G
    B --> H
    D --> H
    G --> H

    %% Details for Storage Layer
    C1([AWS S3])
    C2([Azure Blob])
    C3([GCP Storage])
    C4([On-Prem Storage])
    C --> C1
    C --> C2
    C --> C3
    C --> C4

    %% Details for Distributed Processing
    D1([Spark/Databricks])
    D2([Dask])
    D3([Batch/Streaming Jobs])
    D --> D1
    D --> D2
    D --> D3

    %% Details for Feature Engineering
    E1([Preprocessing])
    E2([Augmentation])
    E3([Annotation])
    E4([Feature Extraction])
    E --> E1
    E --> E2
    E --> E3
    E --> E4

    %% Details for Experiment Management
    G1([Experiment Tracker])
    G2([Model Registry])
    G --> G1
    G --> G2

    %% Details for Governance
    H1([Security & Compliance])
    H2([Audit Logging])
    H --> H1
    H --> H2
```





```{mermaid}
flowchart TB
    %% Top: User
    subsea_user["Subsea CV User<br/>(Petrobras engineers, data scientists, analysts)"]
  
    %% Center: System
    subsea_package["Subsea CV Python Package<br/>Unified library for distributed processing, experiment management, and feature engineering"]
  
    %% Bottom: External Systems
    videos["Subsea Videos<br/>Raw video data"]
    images["Subsea Images<br/>Raw image data"]
    reports["Subsea Reports<br/>Structured/unstructured reports"]
    storage["Object Storage<br/>AWS S3, Azure Blob, GCP, On-Prem"]
    processing["Distributed Processing Engines<br/>Spark, Dask, Batch Jobs"]
    featurestore["Feature Store<br/>Engineered features"]
    experiment["Experiment Management<br/>Tracking & registry"]
    governance["Governance Service<br/>Security, compliance, audit"]
  
    %% Connections
    subsea_user --> subsea_package
    videos --> subsea_package
    images --> subsea_package
    reports --> subsea_package
    subsea_package --> storage
    subsea_package --> processing
    subsea_package --> featurestore
    subsea_package --> experiment
    subsea_package --> governance
```







```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    subgraph Users
        A[Subsea CV Team]
    end
  subgraph Ingestion
        B1[Raw Videos/Images/Reports]
        B2[Ingestion API]
    end
  subgraph Storage
        C1[AWS S3]
        C2[Azure Blob]
        C3[GCP Storage]
        C4[Petrobras On-Prem Storage]
    end
  subgraph Processing
        D1[Distributed Processing Engine]
        D2[Databricks/Spark]
        D3[Dask]
        D4[Batch/Streaming Jobs]
    end
  subgraph FeatureStore
        E1[Feature Engineering Module]
        E2[Feature Store]
    end
  subgraph Experiment
        F1[Experiment Tracking]
        F2[Model Registry]
    end
  subgraph Governance
        G1[Security & Compliance]
        G2[Audit Logging]
    end
  A --> B2
    B1 --> B2
    B2 --> C1
    B2 --> C2
    B2 --> C3
    B2 --> C4
  C1 --> D1
    C2 --> D1
    C3 --> D1
    C4 --> D1
  D1 --> D2
    D1 --> D3
    D1 --> D4
  D2 --> E1
    D3 --> E1
    D4 --> E1
  E1 --> E2
    E2 --> F1
    F1 --> F2
  D1 --> F1
  B2 --> G1
    D1 --> G1
    F1 --> G2
```

---
